description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gradle:alpine Docker image and sets the GRADLE_OPTS variable to -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false. Add a before_script that exports GRADLE_USER_HOME to the .gradle directory in the repository root. Define a single build stage with a job named build that runs the exact command gradle --build-cache dist, and configure its cache to use the key $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME, cache the build directory, and push the cache after the job completes.
